overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a high-rise apartment bedroom in a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, showcasing a panoramic view of towering glass skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and distant mountains through a large window. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with cool blue tones and natural morning light streaming into the dimly lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

multiple flying vehicles visible moving across the skyline

distant mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: A static view from a high-rise apartment bedroom looking out over a futuristic cyberpunk city. The unmade bed and interior furnishings frame a large window revealing towering glass skyscrapers, distant mountains, and occasional flying vehicles passing by in the clear morning sky. Natural sunlight streams into the dimly lit room, highlighting the contrast between the cozy interior and the vast urban landscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic perspective from a dimly lit high-rise bedroom that looks out upon a sprawling, futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within the intimate confines of the room, where an unmade bed and interior furnishings frame a massive window. As the eye moves toward the glass, the view expands to reveal a vast urban landscape of towering glass skyscrapers and distant mountains under a clear morning sky. Natural sunlight streams into the interior, creating a sharp contrast between the cozy, shadowed bedroom and the bright, open city where flying vehicles glide through the air.
